scripts.check: pnpm validation-graph:check && pnpm lint && turbo run typecheck test --affected && pnpm brand:check && pnpm workspace:check
scripts.check:full: pnpm validation-graph:check && pnpm lint && turbo run typecheck test build test:e2e && pnpm brand:check && pnpm monorepo:smoke && pnpm status:smoke
scripts.dev:agent: PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} pnpm --filter docs-agent exec portless run --name agent.paige pnpm dev
scripts.dev:web: PORTLESS_PORT=${PORTLESS_PORT:-1355} PORTLESS_HTTPS=${PORTLESS_HTTPS:-0} pnpm --filter @docs-agent/web exec portless run --name paige pnpm dev:portless
